name: remote_mcp_hosting_provider_tools_list_latency_publisher
friction: The latency benchmark pipeline produces raw measurement files in GCS — but no human-readable output, no machine-discoverable index, and no static site for Google or LLM crawlers.
input: Measurement files (tools_list_*.json) synced from GCS bucket gs://mcp-benchmark-results, written by Cloud Run pingers (tools_list_latency_measurer/gcr_pinger).
output: Static site deployed to GitHub Pages: index.html (global summary), one HTML page per hosting provider, one HTML page per pinger origin, one JSON file per pinger origin, llms.json, llms-full.json.
when_to_use: After new measurement files have been written to GCS and you want to update the public benchmark site.
